goals.title: Import OMP source and establish baseline
goals.objective: Copy .omx/tmp-oh-my-pi into repo root including dotfiles excluding nested .git; preserve attribution/license; initialize git if needed; capture baseline build/check status.
goals.evidence: Copied .omx/tmp-oh-my-pi into repo root with rsync excluding nested .git; initialized git; removed temp clone to prevent Biome nested-root conflict; bun install passed; bun run check attempted and fails only baseline Rust formatting; bun run test attempted and fails baseline missing native addon/cargo-nextest. Logs in .omx/verification/g001-*.log.

goals.title: Rebrand package, CLI, TUI, and docs
goals.objective: Rebrand product to gajae-code and CLI to gjc across package scopes, help text, TUI labels/status, and docs; keep OMP/oh-my-pi only in attribution/history.
goals.evidence: G002-rebrand-gajae-gjc complete: team implement-gajae-code-ed8bd1b1 terminal with 17/17 tasks completed, 0 failed, 0 in_progress; leader verification passed bun scripts/check-visible-definitions.ts, bun scripts/verify-g002-gates.ts, focused skill/discovery/gjc bridge/help tests, bun run check:rs, and bun run check:ts. Evidence artifacts stored under .omx/verification/g002-* and ultragoal audit recorded in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json plus .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl.

goals.title: Remove OMP defaults and enforce exact visible definitions

Evidence: bun scripts/check-visible-definitions.ts PASS; bun scripts/verify-g002-gates.ts PASS exact four visible definitions across .omp/.codex skills, agents, commands, and rules. Audit recorded in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json and .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl.

Evidence: bun scripts/verify-g002-gates.ts PASS MCP quarantine/no default discoverable MCP and inline/local tools preserved; bun test packages/coding-agent/test/acp-builtins.test.ts packages/coding-agent/test/sdk-tool-activation.test.ts packages/coding-agent/test/tool-discovery/tool-index.test.ts PASS 93 tests; .omx/ultragoal/goals.json and .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl updated.

goals.title: Integrate native gjc team runtime
goals.objective: Replace deferred gjc team bridge behavior with a native, GJC-scoped tmux team runtime and telemetry path adapted from /Users/bellman/Documents/Workspace/oh-my-codex, using .gjc state paths where possible while keeping only the public team workflow visible; verify help/tests and open a PR targeting dev.
goals.evidence: Native gjc team runtime integrated: packages/coding-agent/src/commands/team.ts now routes to packages/coding-agent/src/gjc-runtime/team-runtime.ts instead of runBridgedRuntimeEndpoint('team'); state defaults to .gjc/state/team with config/manifest/phase/tasks/mailboxes/events/telemetry; tmux worker launch records panes and worker identity; targeted tests, visible definitions, package check, smoke, and full bun run check passed; PR preparation follows.

codexObjective: Complete the durable gajae-code OMP/OMX runtime plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json under the approved RALPLAN constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as audit trail.
